author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Square Enix comments on possibility of bringing Final Fantasy 15 to Nintendo Switch

Square Enix has briefly commented on the chances of Nintendo Switch getting Final Fantasy 15. And yes, you’re not mistaken reading that – we’re talking about the older system and not Nintendo Switch 2. The company really increased its support for Final Fantasy Nintendo platforms on the console. However, there is a notable game missing in the lineup – that...

The post Square Enix comments on possibility of bringing Final Fantasy 15 to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Demons’ Night Fever coming to Nintendo Switch

Arc System Works is releasing its upcoming project Demons’ Night Fever on Nintendo Switch, the company just announced. A release is scheduled for 2026. Demons’ Night Fever is described as a “speedrun-training simulation RPG”.  Here’s what’s been shared thus far: Kill friends and foes alike! The more you die, the stronger you get in this ruthless speedrun-training simulation RPG. While...

The post Demons’ Night Fever coming to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Absolum coming to Nintendo Switch 2 [update: release date, more details]

April 7: Today, it was revealed that Absolum is coming to Nintendo Switch 2, complete with a physical release. The game will be sold with a full cartridge (no game-key card). Currently it’s on track for a Q3 2026 release. Today’s announcement didn’t immediately clarify if there will be any benefits when playing on the new console, though at the...

The post Absolum coming to Nintendo Switch 2 [update: release date, more details] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Arc System Works announces Qliphah in Providence’s Shadow for Nintendo Switch

Arc System Works is bringing the new game Qliphah in Providence’s Shadow to Nintendo Switch, the company has revealed. It will be available on September 24, 2026. Qliphah in Providence’s Shadow is said to be a tactical counter-timeline RPG. After Shibuya has been destroyed and taken over by supernatural anomalies, two protagonists will go a dark quest to uncover the...

The post Arc System Works announces Qliphah in Providence’s Shadow for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 voice actors revealed, including Fox, Falco, Peppy, Slippy, and more

The new voice actors behind Star Fox have been revealed, including the main crew of Fox, Falco, Peppy, and Slippy. Hunter McCoy has the leading role of Fox McCloud. In the video game space, he’s worked on Dead As Disco as Charlie Disco and Neverness to Everness as the male Esper Zero. Andrew Russel is your new Falco. His past...

The post Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 voice actors revealed, including Fox, Falco, Peppy, Slippy, and more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Golfish, a physics puzzle adventure game, coming to Nintendo Switch

Revulo Games has announced Golfish, a new Nintendo Switch release from the studio. Golfish is a physics puzzle adventure game. Players roll, flop, and splash from ice hole to ice hole as a little fish on a big journey with timing, angle, momentum, and puzzle solving coming into play. More information can be found in the following overview: Golfish is...

The post Golfish, a physics puzzle adventure game, coming to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games with a game-key card release

Following the launch of Nintendo Switch 2, we’re putting together a complete list of Nintendo Switch 2 games with a game-key card release. This is a new approach to physical media, which has seen a mixed reaction. In a way, it’s a hybrid between a true physical release and a download code. Each box comes with a cartridge, but there’s...

The post List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games with a game-key card release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 launch trailer

Nintendo has come out with one last trailer for Star Fox. With the game hitting Switch 2 tomorrow worldwide, this is one of our last looks at the game. Catch up on everything you need to know with the following overview: Maniacal scientist Andross seeks control of the Lylat star system, and only Fox McCloud and the Star Fox team...

The post Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 launch trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Douze Dixiémes, studio behind MIO: Memories in Orbit, is shutting down

We have a bit of sad news to report as we’re hearing that game developer Douze Dixiémes is shutting down. Most recently, the team delivered MIO: Memories in Orbit on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. Douze Dixiémes has been a part of publisher Focus Entertainment. Aside from MIO: Memories in Orbit, the studio worked on Shady Part of Me, which...

The post Douze Dixiémes, studio behind MIO: Memories in Orbit, is shutting down appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Hasbro Games Junior Collection announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

Outright Games today unveiled Hasbro Games Junior Collection, a new package for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. We know that this one is slated for November 6, 2026. Hasbro Games Junior Collection is a fresh take on some of the most globally loved family board games. It features Monopoly Junior, Clue Junior, and Game of Life Junior in one...

The post Hasbro Games Junior Collection announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
